title: Lemnaceae (Duckweed) culturing protocol
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"3hru5","text":"1000 ml beaker","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"613sa","text":"5x YMA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a290s","text":"CaCl2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":4,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2kv5n","text":"5 Falcon tubes per line to culture","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":0,"length":34}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e7641","text":"70% Ethanol In spray bottle","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":0,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1d109","text":"Pipetteman pipetter","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"drpka","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: To prepare 500ml of 1x YMA media in the biosafety cabinet pour 100 ml of sterile 5x YMA media into sterile cylinder.
Spray down inside of biosafety cabinet with ethanol, including materials to be used.
Next add sterile H 2 O till the beaker contains around 350 ml.
Next add 75 ml of CaCl 2 stock solution (sterile stock 1.5mg/ml).
Top off with sterile H 2 O to 500 ml total volume.
Add 500 μL of 1000x stock solution of MgSO 4 x 7H 2 O (150mg/ml, filter sterilized) to media. Transfer prepared media to a sterile bottle and mix by inverting the bottle a few times.
creator: Chris Carlson
